MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, DANIEL COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUL-21-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 07 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

DEPT 7/JUDGE MASON/REPORTER:M.NORMAN/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ATNY ILENE HOCHSTEIN PRESENT WITH PLTF. ANSWERING DEFTS KIMBERLY ANDRIOTAKAS AND MARK SCHOCK, IN PRO-PER, ARE NOT PRESENT. JUDICIAL NOTICE TAKEN OF MAILING OF NOTICE OF TIME & PLACE FOR TRIAL. DEFTS T.LAI AND C. KEITH HAVE NOT BEEN SERVED; PLTF TO FILE DISMISSALS AS TO THESE DEFTS. COURT ORDERS JUDGMNT IN FAVOR OF PLTF AND AGAINST DEFTS ANDRIOTAKAS AND SHOCK. PLTF SUBMITTED PREPARED JUDGMNT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDRIOTAKAS, KIMBERLY J. SCHOCH, MARK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1500 JUDAH STREET #16, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $3,803.37 RENT, $525.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $201.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,529.37, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMT ENTERED FOLLOWING CT TRIAL, DEFTS FAILING TO APPEAR. DEFTS LAI AND KEITH TO BE DISMISSED BY PLTF, UNSERVED.
